removed_fields: venue_controls_retail (removed per instruction: external venue does not establish vendor authority)

added_fields.competition: boolean. TRUE = a known incumbent on-site ceremony flower/keepsake vendor (e.g. The Commencement Group / Convocation Flowers) is CONFIRMED to operate at this institution. FALSE = no incumbent on-site vendor identified in this pass. IMPORTANT: FALSE means 'not found this pass', NOT 'confirmed open market'. See review_flags. In this pass no Alberta incumbent was confirmed, so all values are FALSE-pending-verification. The Commencement Group is confirmed active in Western Canada (U of Regina, U of T), so U of A and U of C especially require incumbent verification.

schema_notes.venue_authority_fields_location: Moved to alberta_notes.json per instruction (cleaner CRM). Fields: venue_contact_recommended, venue_contact_reason, venue_authority_status, venue_source_url.

_meta.honesty_note: Only NAIT and University of Alberta were researched to full contact depth this pass. All 25 identity records are reconciled to Alberta.ca's publicly funded institution list. The remaining 23 require a continuation pass for contacts and vendor status. Fields not verified this pass are null with a review_flag rather than guessed.

relevant_campuses: Augustana Campus (Camrose) - holds its own ceremony
institutions.ceremony_venue: Northern Alberta Jubilee Auditorium, 11455 87 Ave, Edmonton (external, Province of Alberta-operated venue)
institutions.ceremony_pattern: Three convocation periods/year: Spring (June, multi-day), Fall (November), Winter (March). Spring 2026 ran June 4, 9-12, 15-17. Multiple sessions per day, split by faculty.
institutions.graduate_scale: Largest in Alberta; 340,000+ living alumni. Per-year graduate count not verified this pass.
review_flags: Ceremony asks guests to refrain from signs/flags/banners; flowers NOT listed as prohibited (contrast with U of Calgary). Confirm whether an on-site flower vendor operates at the Jubilee ceremonies.
Verify whether The Commencement Group (active at U of Regina) operates here.

institutions.primary_address: 2500 University Dr NW, Calgary, AB T2N 1N4
institutions.ceremony_venue: Jack Simpson Gymnasium (ceremony); regalia pickup at the Olympic Oval, ice level. On-campus, university-controlled.
institutions.ceremony_pattern: Spring (June) and Fall (Nov 9-10, 2026) convocation, plus a February conferral. Multiple ceremonies per period.
institutions.graduate_scale: Very large. Exact count not verified this pass.
review_flags: PRECISE FINDING (verified): flowers and corsages are on the list of items graduands may NOT carry WITH THEM during the ceremony at Jack Simpson Gymnasium. This is NOT a venue-wide ban and does NOT restrict guests. A reception follows the formal ceremony. OPPORTUNITY: sell to families/guests for post-ceremony gifting - do NOT write this off as keepsakes-only.
Official photographer is Artona (photos, not flowers). Check separately whether any flower vendor serves guests/families.
Verified convocation contact: convinfo@ucalgary.ca.

Alumni Association sells frames/rings. Convocation Office phone 403-329-2156 verified; a 'Convocation Coordinator' role handles the ceremony; convocation email redacted in source (do not guess).

Jostens rings; GradPhotos.ca photos; AU Store merch. REMOTE: ceremony is in Athabasca town (~1.5hr N of Edmonton) = low feasibility for Bloom Boys, and a local vendor is already in place.

institutions.primary_address: 4825 Mount Royal Gate SW, Calgary, AB T3E 6K6

Flowers are sold and pre-orderable but NO exclusive vendor is named - a non-exclusive concourse is easier to join than displacing an incumbent. Check the 'pre-order flowers' link destination to see if it's the Commencement Group.
Also hosts a Nursing Pinning Ceremony (June 10 at the Bella) - adjacency for the separate opportunities file.

Jostens does grad rings; Smart Photography does photos. Bloom Boys angle = complementary products the Commencement Group does not cover, or approach at contract renewal - do not expect an easy flower slot.

Not the Commencement Group. Photographer Lifetouch. Convocation is a multi-vendor 'Marketplace'.

relevant_campuses: Lloydminster Campus (AB/SK border) - STRATEGICALLY RELEVANT to Saskatoon base
institutions.ceremony_venue: Lloydminster: Lloyd Gymnasium (campus gym). Vermilion: Vermilion Stadium (procession from curling rink). SEPARATE campus ceremonies.
institutions.ceremony_pattern: TWO separate campus convocations: Lloydminster (~late May, e.g. Fri May 29 2026) and Vermilion (~early June, e.g. June 5). Each ~2hrs.
review_flags: TOP STRATEGIC OPENING: Lloydminster campus runs its OWN convocation (Lloyd Gymnasium) separate from Vermilion, and flowers are sold only in-house via the campus bookstore ('fresh roses, singles/3/6/dozen, while supplies last') - NO professional vendor, NO Commencement Group. Closest AB campus to Saskatoon. Ideal first managed-stand pilot. Named contact: Kyla Graham.
